data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the counter lifecycle.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the counter lifecycle (open, paused, closed), but the evidence provided does not include any checks or details related to this lifecycle. The prior step evidence does not demonstrate the existence or functionality of the counter lifecycle, leading to an inconclusive result. The linked use case mentions the need for the counter lifecycle, but without concrete evidence, the requirement cannot be validated.
gaps: No evidence of counter lifecycle (open, paused, closed) validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the counter lifecycle.
